name: Hunter's Countdown
description: A beautiful new tab experience for hunters with hunting season countdowns and geolocation-based Texas county regulations from TPWD.
author: TravKue

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com
